title: Industry Analyst Relations at Spring IDF 2005 — Peter Kastner Delegate Confirmation Letter
author: Liz Ryon (Intel SAS-Industry Analyst Relations Group)
abstract: Intel Analyst Relations personalized schedule for Peter Kastner (Vericours, Inc., P.O. Box 3480, Westport MA) for Spring IDF 2005 at Moscone West, San Francisco, March 1-3. Features Craig Barrett opening keynote, multicore briefing, Digital Enterprise/Digital Office luncheon and keynote, Sean Maloney mobile briefing, Virtualization Technology 101 briefing, Flash Products Group briefing, TMG (Technology & Manufacturing) briefing, UWB/Wireless USB briefing at W Hotel, Justin Rattner R&D keynote, CE-ATA briefing, and CTO panel. Documents a complete analyst-access schedule six months before the Fall IDF 2005 event.
importance_rationale: Companion artifact to the Fall 2005 IDF schedule; together they document Kastner's sustained tier-1 analyst access to Intel during the Vericours era.
relevance_rationale: Schedule is ephemeral; archival value is biographical.
prescience_rationale: No forward-looking claims in the schedule itself.
